name: Marble Sort!
core_loop: Tap to release colored marbles from trays, watch them fall onto a moving conveyor belt, and time their drop into matching collection boxes to clear levels.
audience_proxy: Female-skewing casual players aged 25-55 who enjoy satisfying, brain-training puzzles.

palette.description: A soft and playful palette with a dominant light purple, accented by a bright, cheerful orange and grounded by neutral greys.
